title: malvaviscus arboreus var. palmanus
intro: Malvaviscus arboreus var. palmanus, also known as the turkey tanglefruit, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. Native to tropical America, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malvaviscus arboreus var. palmanus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
